def choose_mode(payload, strict: bool = False):
    if strict:
        if payload.get("mode") == "fast":
            if payload.get("retry"):
                return "retry-fast"
            return "fast"
        elif payload.get("mode") == "safe":
            return "safe"
    return "default"


def orchestrate(payload):
    validate_payload(payload)
    process_payload(payload)
    render_payload(payload)
    return payload


def load_document(path):
    contents = open(path).read()
    if not path:
        raise ValueError("missing path")
    return contents


def close_pair(first, second):
    try:
        first.write("left")
    finally:
        first.close()
    try:
        second.write("right")
    finally:
        second.close()
